mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (id, title, description, assigner_id, executor_id, importance, urgency, level, response_deadline, completion_deadline, response_time, completion_time, status, parent_task_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{description}, #{assignerId}, #{executorId}, #{importance}, #{urgency}, #{level}, #{responseDeadline}, #{completionDeadline}, #{responseTime}, #{completionTime}, #{status}, #{parentTaskId})

where.if: AND t.assigner_id = #{currentUserId} AND t.parent_task_id IS NULL

choose.when: AND (t.status = 'overdue' OR (t.completion_deadline < NOW() AND t.status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled')))

where.if: AND (t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM tasks t
ORDER BY FIELD(t.level, 'A', 'B', 'C', 'D'), t.completion_deadline ASC, t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId}
SELECT MAX(id) FROM tasks WHERE id LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%')

WITH RECURSIVE task_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId} UNION ALL SELECT t.id FROM tasks t INNER JOIN task_tree tt ON t.parent_task_id = tt.id ) SELECT id FROM task_tree

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('accepted', 'in_progress', 'submitted') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inProgressTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'overdue' OR (completion_deadline < NOW() AND status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueTasks, AVG(CASE WHEN response_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, response_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgResponseHours, AVG(CASE WHEN completion_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, completion_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgCompletionHours FROM tasks
AND (assigner_id IN #{uid} OR executor_id IN #{uid} )

SELECT d.id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, d.level AS level, COUNT(t.id) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'overdue' OR (t.completion_deadline < NOW() AND t.status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue, AVG(CASE WHEN t.completion_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, t.created_at, t.completion_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgHours FROM tasks t INNER JOIN users u ON t.executor_id = u.id INNER JOIN departments d ON u.dept_id = d.id
AND (t.assigner_id IN #{uid} OR t.executor_id IN #{uid} )
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.level ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, AVG(CASE WHEN completion_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, completion_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgHours FROM tasks
AND (assigner_id IN #{uid} OR executor_id IN #{uid} )
GROUP BY level ORDER BY FIELD(level, 'A', 'B', 'C', 'D')

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, COUNT(t.id) AS totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'overdue' OR (t.completion_deadline < NOW() AND t.status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueTasks, AVG(CASE WHEN t.response_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, t.created_at, t.response_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgResponseHours, AVG(CASE WHEN t.completion_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, t.created_at, t.completion_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgCompletionHours FROM tasks t INNER JOIN users u ON t.executor_id = u.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_id = d.id
AND (t.assigner_id IN #{uid} OR t.executor_id IN #{uid} )
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.dept_id, d.name ORDER BY totalTasks DESC
